summary.intent: Add a generic webhook ingress system to Moltis that allows running AI agents triggered by external events from GitHub, GitLab, Stripe, and other providers.
summary.outcome: Fully implemented the moltis-webhooks crate with 59 tests, gateway/HTTP integration, web UI settings page, docs, website updates, and iteratively fixed numerous PR review issues including security bugs (secret leakage, CIDR enforcement, X-Forwarded-For forgery), crash recovery, and SQLite foreign key enforcement.

repo: Sidebar navigation icons in settings are driven by CSS `::before` pseudo-elements in `components.css` using `data-section` attribute selectors — NOT from the `icon` property in the JS sections array
The app serves two separate CSS files: `assets/style.css` (Tailwind output) and `assets/css/style.css` (components) — both must be updated for complete styling
i18n translations work via `website/scripts/build-i18n.mjs` which does string replacement — untranslated strings stay in English by default
The server uses `into_make_service_with_connect_info::<SocketAddr>()` so `ConnectInfo<SocketAddr>` is available as an axum extractor in handlers
`Arc::get_mut` silently returns None if the Arc has already been cloned, making it unreliable for late initialization — use `OnceLock` instead
SQLite `ON DELETE CASCADE` requires `PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON` per connection — set via `SqliteConnectOptions::foreign_keys(true)` on the pool, not per-query
The cron pattern uses named sessions keyed by `webhook:wh_...` for grouping deliveries; the same `chat.send_sync` API is used for background agent invocation
X-Forwarded-For header trust is gated by `gw.behind_proxy` — same pattern used by existing WebSocket origin checks
PagerDuty sends comma-separated `v1=sig1,v1=sig2` signatures for key rotation — must split and check each one
The Changelog Guard CI check blocks manual CHANGELOG.md edits; changelog is auto-generated from git history via git-cliff

code.finding: webhook_store, webhook_rate_limiter, webhook_worker_tx use OnceLock instead of Option to avoid Arc::get_mut silent failures
Stripe timestamp check must fail closed — non-numeric t= values should be rejected, not silently skipped
Generic profile should NOT fall back to body SHA-256 hash as dedup key — identical payloads should always go through when no explicit delivery ID header is present
crash recovery query must include 'processing' status alongside 'received' and 'queued' to retry deliveries interrupted mid-execution
Each settings nav section needs a .settings-nav-item[data-section=NAME]::before rule pointing to a mask SVG
String byte-index slicing like &s[..500] panics on multibyte UTF-8 — need truncate_str() that walks back to find a char boundary
Two separate RwLocks for global and per-webhook limits create TOCTOU race — replaced with single Mutex so check-and-record is atomic
auth_config and source_config must be redacted ([REDACTED]) in all API responses — secrets only read internally by the ingress handler from the store
Webhook ingress route needs CORS headers (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *) and OPTIONS preflight handler for browser-based test tools like Hoppscotch

workflow: PR review bots flag stale issues on old commits — always check if the issue still exists in current code before fixing
Add integration tests immediately when implementing security-sensitive features (auth, CIDR, dedup, rate limiting) — every PR review bug found was something a test would have caught
Use OnceLock for late-initialized shared state on Arc — Arc::get_mut is fragile and silently fails when any other reference exists
Hoppscotch web app cannot reach localhost with self-signed certs due to CORS + mixed-content restrictions — recommend the desktop app instead
When body-hash dedup is used as a fallback, identical test payloads are always deduplicated making iterative testing difficult — only dedup on explicit sender-provided IDs

friction: Arc::get_mut silently returned None causing webhook_store to never be set, resulting in 404 on all ingress requests — took full debug cycle to identify
Two separate style.css files (Tailwind output vs components CSS) caused icon to not appear — the CSS mask class was in the wrong file
Hoppscotch web tool fails on localhost self-signed certs — misleading recommendation that required correction
Changelog Guard CI failed because a merge operation modified CHANGELOG.md — had to restore manually

Multiple rounds of P1 security review comments (secrets in API responses, CIDR not enforced, X-Forwarded-For forgery, Stripe timestamp bypass, SQLite FK cascade not working) — these should have been caught by initial tests
ConnectInfo extractor failed on first attempt because Option<ConnectInfo> doesn't work — required checking server setup to confirm the extractor is available
open_items: Live-refresh chat UI when background workers append messages to already-open sessions (affects both webhooks and cron named sessions) — filed as beads issue moltis-2pu
Linear, Jira, PagerDuty, and Sentry provider profiles are in the plan but only GitHub, GitLab, Stripe, and Generic are implemented
Translations for webhook feature text in all 9 language website files — currently stays in English
CIDR allowlist UI in the webhook create/edit modal is not implemented — field exists in the data model but not exposed in the UI
Per-entity session locking (serialized processing for all events on the same PR/issue) planned but not implemented
Response action tools (post GitHub comments, merge PRs, issue Stripe refunds) planned but not implemented — agents can only receive events, not act back via typed tools
Audit table for response actions planned but not created
Webhook event catalog UI (checkboxes from known events per profile) not implemented — event filtering is free-form text
